project_info.name: Beyond The Blades (ASD Foundation)
project_info.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Adapted for Soft Utility (Blue/White)

typography.instructions: Follow the 'Anti-Default Rule'. Use Outfit for distinctive, modern, and warm headings. Use Work Sans for highly readable body copy. Maintain tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) on large headings and loose line-height on paragraphs.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900

colors.instructions: Strictly adhere to the requested 'shades of blue and white'. Avoid pure black; use deep slate blue for high-contrast text. Use bright, inviting blues for CTAs and calm, airy blues for backgrounds.

spacing_and_layout.instructions: Utilize generous spacing (p-8, p-12, p-16) to create a breathable, 'warm and inviting' feel. Implement Bento grids for the Impact page to avoid boring layouts. Never center everything by default; use deliberate asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl (Soft geometry to align with 'warm & inviting')

surfaces_and_shadows.instructions: Apply soft Neumorphism or Glassmorphism strategically. Cards should not feel rigid. Use 1px subtle borders combined with very soft ambient shadows.
surfaces_and_shadows.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]
surfaces_and_shadows.header_nav: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/25
buttons.secondary: bg-blue-50 hover:bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all border border-blue-200

components.inputs: rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all px-4 py-3
components.icons_library: lucide-react (using soft, rounded icons where possible)
components.donate_footer_cta: Must be prominently displayed at the bottom of every page. A sticky/fixed bottom approach or a large banner directly above the footer.

motion.instructions: Use Framer Motion for smooth entrances and soft hover states to bring the UI to life without being distracting. Follow accessibility rules for reduced motion.

media.instructions: Use these precise image URLs. Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile. Use soft rounded corners (rounded-3xl) for images. If placing text over images, use a soft gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-900/60 to-transparent) to ensure APCA contrast.

hero_background.description: Abstract blue waves create a calming and modern design background, ideal for digital projects.
hero_background.usage: Hero section background with an overlay, or general page backgrounds.

hero_hockey_kids.description: a group of young children playing a game of ice hockey
hero_hockey_kids.usage: Hero section prominent feature image or Main page intro.

badminton_kids.description: Two boys enjoying a badminton game outdoors at sunset, capturing the fun and energy of sports.

hiking_kids.description: Two hikers walk on a trail with trees.

volunteers_community.description: Woman in blue offers items to runners at event.

specific_requirements.donate_button_global: A 'Donate' CTA button MUST be present on the bottom of every page.
specific_requirements.copyright_text: Footer MUST include: '© 2026 Beyond The Blades | Non-Profit Organization'.
specific_requirements.impact_quote: Impact page MUST include the quote: 'Different, not less.' - Dr. Temple Grandin.
specific_requirements.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, and forms MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='donate-button').
